item.title: As I repeat: if you are going to claim that people are forced or coerced or required through social or economic forces to join, ...
item.description:
As I repeat: if you are going to claim that people are forced or coerced or required through social or economic forces to join, you should join me in criticising every single person who doesn’t join for that reason or attempts to use this position to silence descent



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: @pattiegonia does incredible work, and regardless a company should not even be tolerated in trying to excerise this type of powe...
“Ya know bro, you asking me that was so just uncool why do you have to ask that now?
item.description:
“Ya know bro, you asking me that was so just uncool why do you have to ask that now? I have to lie to everyone.” - Wes Moore probably



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: They are getting scared and we can see why they are getting scared, so we need to move pragmatically and effectively to undermin...
item.description:
They are getting scared and we can see why they are getting scared, so we need to move pragmatically and effectively to undermine the contradictions that they uphold, and that we do not confuse people acting within that system on opposition to them as our allies



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: This is true of American elections by the way
